title: A systematic review of interleukin-2-based immunotherapies in clinical trials for cancer and autoimmune diseases
scope_summary: IL-2 and IL-2 variant clinical trials across cancer and autoimmunity, Treg vs effector balance.
notes: Side-list lead for IL-2-variant ratio-shift literature.

title: Selective targeting or reprogramming of intra-tumoral Tregs
scope_summary: Intratumoral Treg-selective therapies overview (CCR8, CCR4, CTLA-4-Fc, etc.).
notes: Side-list lead spanning multiple intervention classes.

title: Recent advances with Treg depleting fusion protein toxins for cancer immunotherapy
scope_summary: Denileukin diftitox, E7777, and related fusion-toxin Treg-depleting agents.

title: Targeting adenosine and regulatory T cells in cancer immunotherapy
scope_summary: Adenosine axis (CD39/CD73/A2AR) and Treg biology in cancer.

title: Next-generation CTLA-4 targeting molecules and combination therapy for cancer immunotherapy
scope_summary: Fc-enhanced and pH-sensitive CTLA-4 antibodies for Treg depletion.
notes: Side-list lead for Fc-enhanced CTLA-4 class.

title: Anti-CTLA-4 antibodies in cancer immunotherapy: selective depletion of intratumoral regulatory T cells or checkpoint blockade?
scope_summary: Mechanistic debate on whether anti-CTLA-4 depletes intratumoral Tregs in humans.
notes: Useful framing of the Sharma 2019 vs Arce Vargas 2018 debate.
